lature. Later developments made
it appear that they intended to play
both to the temperance and liquor
elements in the campaign, and for
get all about county option after
the governor left office Jan. 1.
Thereby they aroused a fighting
Methodist. Several matters that
seemed to the governor urgent
enough to require a special session
prompted him to call one. And he
indicated that county option should
be one of the laws passed. The
party bosses howled, roared and
shrieked. The governor insisted.
They might as we'll have protested
to one of the numerous bronze
statues in town. County option
goes-if the governor can make it
go


"If they were sincere when they
adopted the PLATFORM he says,
they will have the power to exc
cute the temperance plank. The
Legislature will be in session. If
it is a right thing to do in January
it is right in September.
The governor was asked about


the story that he was stirring up


trouble because of his unpleasant


experience at the Chicago conven


ton.


That is absurd" he said. Chi


cago has nothing to do with my
duties as governor
| Would he take the stump fol
Taft? He would make speeches in
Indiana after the legislature ad
| journed.


All of which explains Hanly, who
| is not afraid of the cars.
